basic_details.job_title: Gliders India – Company Secretary, DGM and More – 6 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gliders India Recruitment 2026 for 6 posts of Fixed Term Employment. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech, Master's Degree / Ph.D, MBA, CS, LLB Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Gliders India official website glidersindia.in.

age_limit.age_details: Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) Rs. 12,00,000/-

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in relevant fields like Textile Technology, Engineering, Computer Science, IT, or Company Secretary registration. Experience requirements vary by post.

salary_details.pay_scale: Annual CTC ranging from Rs. 14,40,000/- for DGM - Product Development, and Last Basic Pay - Pension (Ex. DA) up to Rs. 12,00,000/- for other posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gliders India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Gliders India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Company Secretary, DGM and More Posts
